arts.ttl: ‘Mind-blowing’ Chelsea set to DROP €500m worth of stars for Arsenal
arts.sum: In what was a remarkable show of squad depth from Chelsea, the likes of Joao Felix and Christopher Nkunku both played prominently against Noah, each scoring two goals, but may well be substitutes for the big Premier League match against rivals Arsenal. Otherwise, Maresca’s squad is likely to be given a complete overhaul to face an Arsenal team that has been stretched by injury of late and was forced to play a tough Champions League match against Inter Milan in midweek, going down 1-0 in Italy.
